basic_details.job_title: ICAR CIRCOT Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Offline
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (ICAR CIRCOT)
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (ICAR CIRCOT) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website circot.icar.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR CIRCOT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST, 10 years for PH candidates as per GOI rules. 40 years for female candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.E / M. Tech. in any discipline or equivalent with 4/5 years of Bachelor's degree, B.E / B. Tech in Textile Technology/ Electronics Engg./ Electrical Engg./ Instrumentation Engg./Computer Science & Technology or Information Technology/ Agricultural Engg./ Agricultural Structures and Process Engineering/ Post Harvest Engineering and Technology/ Farm Machinery and Power/ Mechanical Engineering/ Any other relevant U.G with GATE/JRF qualified, Knowledge of design and development of instruments, Testing of electronic circuit boards, Software development, Statistical Analysis, Research paper/report writing
qualification.details: M.E / M. Tech. in any discipline or equivalent with 4/5 years of Bachelor's degree OR B.E / B. Tech in Textile Technology/ Electronics Engg./ Electrical Engg./ Instrumentation Engg./Computer Science & Technology or Information Technology/ Agricultural Engg./ Agricultural Structures and Process Engineering/ Post Harvest Engineering and Technology/ Farm Machinery and Power/ Mechanical Engineering/ Any other relevant U.G with GATE/JRF qualified. Desirable: Knowledge of design and development of instruments, Testing of electronic circuit boards, Software development, Statistical Analysis, Research paper/report writing.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000 + HRA (as applicable) for 1st and 2nd year & Rs. 42000 + HRA (as applicable) for 3rd year

content_sections.heading: ICAR CIRCOT Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICAR CIRCOT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICAR CIRCOT Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR CIRCOT Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.E / M. Tech. in any discipline or equivalent with 4/5 years of Bachelor's degree OR B.E / B. Tech in Textile Technology/ Electronics Engg./ Electrical Engg./ Instrumentation Engg./Computer Science & Technology or Information Technology/ Agricultural Engg./ Agricultural Structures and Process Engineering/ Post Harvest Engineering and Technology/ Farm Machinery and Power/ Mechanical Engineering/ Any other relevant U.G with GATE/JRF qualified. Desirable: Knowledge of design and development of instruments, Testing of electronic circuit boards, Software development, Statistical Analysis, Research paper/report writing.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST, 10 years for PH candidates as per GOI rules. 40 years for female candidates.

content_sections.heading: Salary/ Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37000 + HRA (as applicable) for 1st and 2nd year & Rs. 42000 + HRA (as applicable) for 3rd year

rows.event: Last Date for Email Application Submission

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR CIRCOT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICAR CIRCOT Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to submit the application for ICAR CIRCOT JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for email application submission is 31st July 2026. Candidates are encouraged to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Research Fellow position is scheduled for 3rd August 2026. Candidates should ensure they arrive on time.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.E/M.Tech or equivalent with a 4/5 year Bachelor's degree, or a B.E/B.Tech in specific engineering disciplines with GATE/JRF qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 35 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The salary for the JRF post ranges from Rs. 37000 to Rs. 42000 per month, plus HRA as applicable.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post at ICAR CIRCOT.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this job?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the ICAR CIRCOT located?
faq.answer: ICAR Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (ICAR CIRCOT) is located in Mumbai, Maharashtra, with the pincode 400019.
